title: Solution of Quadratic and Cubic Equations
summary: This page covers two mathematical rules: L'Hôpital's Rule for evaluating indeterminate limits of the form 0/0 or ∞/∞, and methods for solving quadratic and cubic equations. The quadratic formula is presented, followed by a detailed procedure for reducing a general cubic equation to a depressed cubic form and solving it using Cardano's method with auxiliary variables A and B. The page concludes with a references section.
